description: Style NoteThe collector's edition perfume from boss comes in a shiny silver flacon. Wear this for an evening date or a weekend party at an upscale joint.Product DetailsThe Collector's Edition of Boss by hugo boss for men balances a fruity top note with flowery-spicy middle notes of geranium and clove. Strong masculine base notes of sandalwood, cedar and vetiverCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
